inputs.label: Number of Decks
inputs.businessContext: Number of decks in the shoe, typically 1-8.

inputs.label: Aces Remaining
inputs.businessContext: Number of aces left in the shoe.

inputs.label: Ten-value Cards Remaining
inputs.businessContext: Number of 10, J, Q, K left in the shoe.

inputs.label: Other Cards Remaining
inputs.businessContext: Number of 2-9 cards left in the shoe.

formulas.blackjackProbability: ((acesRemaining / (acesRemaining + tensRemaining + otherCardsRemaining)) * (tensRemaining / (acesRemaining + tensRemaining + otherCardsRemaining - 1)) + (tensRemaining / (acesRemaining + tensRemaining + otherCardsRemaining)) * (acesRemaining / (acesRemaining + tensRemaining + otherCardsRemaining - 1))) * 100
